summary: Iteration 3 (futuristic dark-theme + responsive + animation upgrade) verified. Backend 4/4 (root, health, config, 404). Frontend TypeScript compile clean ('No issues found') and ZERO console errors on every public page. Landing renders at 1920px with bold black 'The HR answer engine,' hero and 'built for every Zensari.' in the coral->red gradient; the dark navy chat preview card is visible on the right with the LIVE DEMO label, sample question, '4 casual leaves' answer, India-Leave-v3.2 citation chip, 'Open Leave Portal' button, and the parental-leave input. At 390px mobile, content stacks vertically and remains readable. The Zensar pillars section ('Our experience pillars') is present below the hero. Sign-in renders the dark #050514 left brand panel with the aurora red/violet glow + 'Every policy. Every region. One assistant.' headline; right side is the white form on light theme. All 6 public routes (/sign-in, /sign-up, /forgot-password, /reset-password, /verify-email, /unauthorized) render (4.6KB - 5.3KB body each, none crash). /app/dashboard while unauthenticated correctly redirects to /sign-in. /this-does-not-exist returns the 404 page. No 'AI-slop' purple-white gradient observed on landing. New Ambient + InteractiveCard + AnimatedCounter + Sparkline files compile and are referenced; framer-motion + react-markdown installed.
action_items: Apply /app/supabase/migrations/001_init_schema.sql in Supabase so authenticated Employee/HR/Admin dashboards (which now use InteractiveCard + AnimatedCounter + Sparkline) can be exercised end-to-end in the next iteration.
Once a seeded employee/HR/admin login exists, drive an authenticated walkthrough to verify the framer-motion stagger, KPI sparklines, pulse-soft activity bars, and ⌘K search pill on the top-bar.
Optional: also smoke-test at 2560px (4xl breakpoint) to confirm 3xl:text-8xl typography scales correctly on ultra-wide TVs.
critical_code_review_comments: Ambient backdrop is fixed/pointer-events-none and globally mounted via AppShell - good separation; ensure z-index of glass-dark sidebar stays above the aurora orbs (looked correct in the build).
InteractiveCard uses framer-motion + mouse-move radial-glow - confirm prefers-reduced-motion is respected for accessibility (recommend a quick guard on the tilt transform).
AnimatedCounter should clean up its rAF / interval on unmount to avoid React state-after-unmount warnings during rapid route changes - worth a quick audit.
Tailwind 3xl (1920) / 4xl (2560) custom screens look fine in config; verify no existing class collides with the default 2xl breakpoint usage in older pages.
Public pages are still on light theme as expected; AppShell only switches the authenticated chrome to glass-dark per user theme preference - cleanly scoped, no leakage onto landing/auth.
Backend remains intentionally minimal (3 endpoints) - no changes needed for this iteration.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (13/13 functional checks; 1 false-negative on text-match for chat preview, visually confirmed via screenshot)

test_credentials: /app/memory/test_credentials.md not present. Not needed for this iteration - only public flows + redirects in scope.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 visual/UX upgrade verified clean. To extend in iteration 4: (a) seed a Supabase user, sign in, and visit /app/dashboard to verify InteractiveCard tilt + radial glow + framer-motion stagger fires, (b) navigate to /app/hr and /app/admin to verify Sparkline charts and AnimatedCounter values increment from 0, (c) check ⌘K search pill is keyboard-accessible on the top-bar, (d) test at 2560px to confirm 4xl typography scaling on the landing hero and dashboard greeting, (e) confirm pulse-soft activity dots animate on Admin/HR activity bars. The Ambient + InteractiveCard + AnimatedCounter components are new in /app/frontend/src/components/common/. AppShell rebuilt at /app/frontend/src/components/layout/AppShell.tsx with glass-dark sidebar + gradient active-nav indicator.
